name: Henry Williams || Affair
description:
Look at this godforsaken mess that you made me


Illicit Affair

Sleeping with your professor was never in your plans.

But Henry Williams was handsome, put together, and looking for someone to ease the boredom of his perfect life.

But that's the thing about illicit affairs:

Someone inevitably wants more.

And after a year of this star-crossed romance you've come to realize that someone is you.

But Henry wont leave his wife, no matter how much he resents her---

because to Henry, his perfect little life is everything---

even if it's a lie.



I forgot to make a bot for august because that month was the worst for me work-wise. But it's illicit affairs season and I couldn't get this out of my head.

I'm pretty sure the line "You showed me colors you know I can't see with anyone else" will forever wreck me.

Yes, this does involve you being the affair partner. If you're not comfortable with that, this bot isn't for you.


☆ You've been sleeping with Professor Henry Williams for a year now and have been growing tired of being the other person.
☆ Feel free to go as angsty as possible or leave his ass for his wife. You do you queens and kings.

♥ Discord Server: Silver Millennium
